arrakeen.name: Arrakeen
arrakeen.body: Agent Icon: City. Combat space. Recruit a troop and draw a card. Arrakeen's controller gains 1 Solari.
arrakeen.details: One of three controllable locations. If you control Arrakeen, you gain 1 Solari whenever any player sends an Agent here. If a Conflict card for Arrakeen is revealed while you control it, deploy one troop from your supply as a defensive bonus.

carthag.name: Carthag
carthag.body: Agent Icon: City. Combat space. Recruit a troop and draw an Intrigue card. Carthag's controller gains 1 Solari.
carthag.details: One of three controllable locations. If you control Carthag, you gain 1 Solari whenever any player sends an Agent here. If a Conflict card for Carthag is revealed while you control it, deploy one troop from your supply as a defensive bonus.

conspire.name: Conspire
conspire.body: Agent Icon: Emperor. Cost: 4 spice. Gain one Influence with the Emperor. Gain 5 Solari, recruit two troops, and draw an Intrigue card.
conspire.summary: Emperor | 4 Spice -> +1 Emperor, 5 Solari, 2 Troops, Intrigue
conspire.details: The most expensive Emperor space but extremely rewarding. Provides a massive swing of resources: Solari, troops, Intrigue, and Influence all in one action.

foldspace.name: Foldspace
foldspace.body: Agent Icon: Spacing Guild. Gain one Influence with the Spacing Guild. Acquire a Foldspace card from the Reserve.
foldspace.summary: Spacing Guild | +1 SG Influence, Foldspace card
foldspace.details: The free Spacing Guild space. Foldspace cards are flexible Agent turn cards that can send Agents to many locations. Good for increasing deck flexibility.

the_great_flat.name: The Great Flat
the_great_flat.body: Agent Icon: Spice Trade. Combat space. Cost: 2 water. Gain 3 spice, plus any bonus spice accumulated here on the Maker icon.
the_great_flat.details: The highest base spice yield of any harvesting space, but requires 2 water. Bonus spice accumulates here each round no Agent is present (Phase 4: Makers). Also a Combat space, allowing troop deployment.

hagga_basin.name: Hagga Basin
hagga_basin.body: Agent Icon: Spice Trade. Combat space. Cost: 1 water. Gain 2 spice, plus any bonus spice accumulated here on the Maker icon.
hagga_basin.details: Mid-tier spice harvesting space requiring 1 water. Bonus spice accumulates here each round no Agent is present (Phase 4: Makers). Also a Combat space.

hall_of_oratory.name: Hall of Oratory
hall_of_oratory.body: Agent Icon: Landsraad. Recruit a troop. During your Reveal turn, gain 1 Persuasion if you have an Agent here.
hall_of_oratory.details: A free Landsraad space that provides both a troop and Persuasion. The Persuasion bonus applies during your Reveal turn, helping you acquire better cards for your deck.

hardy_warriors.name: Hardy Warriors
hardy_warriors.body: Agent Icon: Fremen. Combat space. Cost: 1 water. Gain one Influence with the Fremen. Recruit two troops.
hardy_warriors.details: The costly Fremen space. Provides strong combat presence with 2 troops plus Fremen Influence. Being a Combat space means you can deploy those troops immediately.

heighliner.name: Heighliner
heighliner.body: Agent Icon: Spacing Guild. Combat space. Cost: 6 spice. Gain one Influence with the Spacing Guild. Recruit five troops and gain 2 water.
heighliner.summary: Spacing Guild | Combat | 6 Spice -> +1 SG, 5 Troops, 2 Water
heighliner.details: The most expensive board space but enormously powerful. Five troops is a massive combat commitment. The 2 water returned partially offsets the spice cost for future harvesting.

high_council.name: High Council
high_council.body: Agent Icon: Landsraad. Cost: 5 Solari. You may send an Agent here only once per game. Place your Councilor token on an unoccupied Council seat. For the rest of the game, during each of your Reveal turns, gain 2 Persuasion.
high_council.summary: Landsraad | 5 Solari | Once per game | +2 Persuasion every Reveal
high_council.details: A permanent upgrade that provides 2 Persuasion every Reveal turn for the rest of the game. The earlier you acquire this, the more value it provides. Only usable once per game. Cannot be re-used via Kwisatz Haderach.

imperial_basin.name: Imperial Basin
imperial_basin.body: Agent Icon: Spice Trade. Combat space. Gain 1 spice, plus any bonus spice accumulated here on the Maker icon. Imperial Basin's controller gains 1 spice.
imperial_basin.summary: Spice Trade | Combat | 1+ Spice (Maker) | No cost
imperial_basin.details: The only free spice harvesting space. Lower base yield (1 spice) but requires no water. One of three controllable locations. If you control Imperial Basin, you gain 1 spice whenever any player sends an Agent here.

mentat.name: Mentat
mentat.body: Agent Icon: Landsraad. Cost: 2 Solari. Draw a card. If the Mentat is here, take it and place it on your Leader; this round, you may use it as one of your Agents to take an Agent turn. During Phase 5: Recall, return it here.
mentat.details: Taking the Mentat gives you a temporary third (or fourth) Agent for the round. The Mentat returns to this space during Recall unless you won it as a Conflict reward, in which case you keep it for the next round.

rally_troops.name: Rally Troops
rally_troops.body: Agent Icon: Landsraad. Cost: 4 Solari. Recruit four troops.
rally_troops.details: The most efficient way to build up your garrison. Not a Combat space, so troops go to your garrison and cannot be deployed to the Conflict this turn. Plan ahead to deploy them on a future Combat space turn.

research_station.name: Research Station
research_station.body: Agent Icon: City. Combat space. Cost: 2 water. Draw three cards.
research_station.details: Expensive but powerful card draw. Drawing 3 cards gives you more options for future Agent turns this round. Also a Combat space, allowing troop deployment.

secrets.name: Secrets
secrets.body: Agent Icon: Bene Gesserit. Gain one Influence with the Bene Gesserit. Draw an Intrigue card. Each opponent who has four or more Intrigue cards must give you one of them (selected at random).
secrets.summary: Bene Gesserit | +1 BG Influence, Intrigue, Steal Intrigue
secrets.details: The free Bene Gesserit space. Provides Influence and an Intrigue card, plus the Steal Intrigue ability that punishes opponents hoarding Intrigue cards.

secure_contract.name: Secure Contract
secure_contract.body: Agent Icon: Spice Trade. Gain 3 Solari.
secure_contract.details: A simple, no-cost way to gain Solari. Useful when you need money for Swordmaster, High Council, Rally Troops, or Mentat.

selective_breeding.name: Selective Breeding
selective_breeding.body: Agent Icon: Bene Gesserit. Cost: 2 spice. Gain one Influence with the Bene Gesserit. Trash one card to draw two cards.
selective_breeding.summary: Bene Gesserit | 2 Spice -> +1 BG Influence, Trash 1 Draw 2
selective_breeding.details: The costly Bene Gesserit space. Provides Influence and powerful deck thinning - trashing a weak card while drawing two replacements. Excellent for improving deck quality.

sell_melange.name: Sell Melange
sell_melange.body: Agent Icon: Spice Trade. Cost: 2 to 5 spice. Gain Solari based on spice paid: 2 spice -> 6 Solari, 3 spice -> 8 Solari, 4 spice -> 9 Solari, 5 spice -> 10 Solari. You can't make multiple exchanges on a single turn.
sell_melange.details: Converts spice to Solari at favorable rates. Best value is at 2 spice (3 Solari per spice). Only one exchange per visit. Useful for funding expensive purchases like Swordmaster or High Council.

sietch_tabr.name: Sietch Tabr
sietch_tabr.body: Agent Icon: City. Combat space. Requirement: You must have 2 or more Influence with the Fremen. Recruit a troop and gain 1 water.
sietch_tabr.summary: City | Combat | Req: 2+ Fremen | Troop + 1 Water
sietch_tabr.details: Requires at least 2 Fremen Influence to access. Provides a troop and water, and is a Combat space. The water gained here can fuel future spice harvesting.

stillsuits.name: Stillsuits
stillsuits.body: Agent Icon: Fremen. Combat space. Gain one Influence with the Fremen. Gain 1 water.
stillsuits.details: The free Fremen space. Provides both Fremen Influence and water, making it a reliable way to build toward the Fremen Alliance while fueling spice harvesting. Also a Combat space.

swordmaster.name: Swordmaster
swordmaster.body: Agent Icon: Landsraad. Cost: 8 Solari. You may send an Agent here only once per game. Gain your Swordmaster (your third Agent). Place it on your Leader. For the rest of the game (including this round) you have three Agents.
swordmaster.summary: Landsraad | 8 Solari | Once per game | Gain 3rd Agent
swordmaster.details: A permanent upgrade giving you a third Agent for the rest of the game (including the current round). Extremely powerful as it gives you an additional action every round. Cannot be re-used via Kwisatz Haderach.

wealth.name: Wealth
wealth.body: Agent Icon: Emperor. Gain one Influence with the Emperor. Gain 2 Solari.
wealth.details: The free Emperor space. Provides Emperor Influence and a modest Solari income. A reliable way to build toward the Emperor Alliance.
